metrics.name: Example Score Metric
metrics.shortDescription: A short tooltip description of this metric.
metrics.fullDescription: A longer description explaining what this metric measures, how it is collected, and what a good score looks like.

metrics.name: Example Yes/No Metric
metrics.shortDescription: Tracks whether something was adopted or used.
metrics.fullDescription: A longer description explaining the adoption metric and how entries are recorded.

_fieldTemplates.score-1-10: Decimal score from 1 to 10, displayed as an average
_fieldTemplates.score-1-5: Decimal score from 1 to 5, displayed as an average
_fieldTemplates.yes-no: Yes/No radio, displayed as a percentage of Yes responses
_fieldTemplates.yes-somewhat-no: Tally of Yes/Somewhat/No responses, displayed as a computed average (Yes=3, Somewhat=2, No=1)
